title: Rutter Invoice
description: Structure of an invoice from a connected accounting platform via the Rutter Unified API

fields.name: customer_id
fields.description: The ID of the customer this invoice belongs to

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current invoice status: draft, open, paid, voided

fields.name: amount_due
fields.description: Total amount due on the invoice

fields.name: currency
fields.description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP)
